subcodes.first_line: O ye who are afflicted with grievous calamity and dire catastrophe! Verily, God's test is severe and His trial [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المصابان بمصیبه کبری و رزیه عظمی ان امتحان الله لشدید و افتتان الله
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
